review_log.note: Reviewer subagent PASS: the issue doc is complete, all five findings scored 2+ on clarity, testability, and completeness, and the Intent section contains a goal, priority ranking, decision boundaries, and stop rules.
Reviewer subagent PASS: the phased implementation plan fully covers P1-P5, traces every issue-doc success criterion to implementation or test coverage, and introduces no clear scope creep.

Added ignored checkpoint-backed bootstrap recovery in install.sh, atomic HA token sync into .env, machine-readable partial-state failures from the seed helper, and focused regression coverage for checkpoint resume plus safe refusal without a checkpoint; reran `python3 -m unittest tests.test_install_sh tests.test_seed_ha_storage -v` successfully (7 tests passed).

Aligned install.sh, CLAUDE.md, and tools/setup.md on the automatic post-install continuation path; added visible START/DONE/FAILED phase labels around slow installer steps; and reran `python3 -m unittest tests.test_install_sh tests.test_setup_docs -v` successfully within the broader docs/install suite.

Made `tools/_errors.md` the canonical recovery ladder and pointed CLAUDE.md, tools/setup.md, and tools/integrations/_guide.md at the same ordered recovery contract; reran `python3 -m unittest tests.test_recovery_docs tests.test_setup_docs tests.test_integrations_docs -v` successfully within the broader docs suite.

Expanded regression coverage for interrupted install resume, safe refusal without checkpoint state, slow-phase labeling, setup handoff, and the shared recovery ladder; reran `python3 -m unittest tests.test_install_sh tests.test_seed_ha_storage tests.test_setup_docs tests.test_integrations_docs tests.test_recovery_docs -v` successfully (13 tests passed).
Validation report written to `docs/openclaw-install-recovery-validation-report.md` with file-level evidence for P1-P5 plus the final 13-test unittest run; all five findings validated within scope.
